title: BLOCK 4 FINAL: Speed mastery
description: Block 4 final exam — 55 WPM on a real-world mixed-content paragraph
text: By the end of Q2 2026, the team had shipped 12 features, closed 47 tickets, and gained 8,500 new users (+34% MoM). Average response time dropped to 180 ms. CEO David Lopez wrote: "Outstanding work, everyone. Next quarter: aim for 95% retention."
finger_focus: Full keyboard — speed gate at 55 WPM

tips.text: This is the longest passage you have faced yet. A full page of real copy, the kind that lands on a desk every day.
Clear it at this pace and you are, plainly, a fast typist. Not a beginner who has learned the keys, but someone who can make a deadline.

tips.target: By the end of Q2 2026, the team had shipped 12 features, closed 47 tickets, and gained 8,500 new users (+34%
tips.hint: Full keyboard - speed gate at 55 WPM

tips.text: What follows is sharpening: holding speed while the accuracy tightens. The foundation is already poured.

tips.title: Подсказка
tips.text: Write down the number you hit today. You will want to look back at it when the later work pushes you well past it.

tips.target: MoM). Average response time dropped to 180 ms. CEO David Lopez wrote: "Outstanding work, everyone. Next quarter: aim for 95% retention."
tips.hint: Full keyboard - speed gate at 55 WPM

character_tips.anna: Block four, done. You clear this gate and you have earned the word fast. Steady on. - Eleanor Hayes, editor
character_tips.maxim: The speed is there. From here the work is refinement, trimming the small errors until the page comes out clean the first time. - Eleanor Hayes, editor
character_tips.knopych: Four blocks behind you. You did not rush it, you built it. That is why it will last. - Eleanor Hayes, editor
character_tips.klavochka: You have come a long way, and quietly. Mark the moment, then turn the page. - Eleanor Hayes, editor
